creator: roelof@n669.telekabel.euronet.nl
text:
===>  Building for apache-php3-1.3.4
===> src
===> src/os/unix
<=== src/os/unix
===> src/ap
<=== src/ap
===> src/main
<=== src/main
===> src/modules
===> src/modules/standard
<=== src/modules/standard
===> src/modules/proxy
<=== src/modules/proxy
===> src/modules/ssl
<=== src/modules/ssl
===> src/modules/php3
<=== src/modules/php3
<=== src/modules
cc -c  -I./os/unix -I./include  -DHARD_SERVER_LIMIT=512  -DDOCUMENT_LOCATION=\"/
usr/local/www/data/\"  -DDEFAULT_PATH=\"/bin:/usr/bin:/usr/local/bin\" -funsigne
d-char -DMOD_SSL=202102 -DEAPI -O -pipe `./apaci` modules.c
cc -c  -I./os/unix -I./include  -DHARD_SERVER_LIMIT=512  -DDOCUMENT_LOCATION=\"/
usr/local/www/data/\"  -DDEFAULT_PATH=\"/bin:/usr/bin:/usr/local/bin\" -funsigne
d-char -DMOD_SSL=202102 -DEAPI -O -pipe `./apaci` buildmark.c
cc -DHARD_SERVER_LIMIT=512  -DDOCUMENT_LOCATION=\"/usr/local/www/data/\"  -DDEFA
ULT_PATH=\"/bin:/usr/bin:/usr/local/bin\" -funsigned-char -DMOD_SSL=202102 -DEAP
I -O -pipe `./apaci`   -Wl,-E  -o httpd buildmark.o modules.o  modules/standard/
libstandard.a  modules/php3/libphp3.a  main/libmain.a  ./os/unix/libos.a  ap/lib
ap.a  -L/usr/local/lib -Lmodules/php3 -L../modules/php3 -L../../modules/php3 -lm
odphp3          -R/usr/local/lib/mysql -L/usr/local/lib/mysql -lmysqlclient     
   -L/usr/local/lib -R/usr/local/lib -lldap -llber  -L/usr/local/lib -lgd -lz   
         -lttf -lm -lcrypt   -lcrypt
*** Error code 1

Stop.
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: 
	
on a clean european system install the apache/PHP3 port with lotsa
options selected. I.e. all but PostgreSQL, mSQL and dBase; not sure
about pdflib. During the process it will fail stating that one must
give a certain parameter when outside the US. Provide that paramater
when resuming the install process.
